base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_key — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1986 legend of zelda. Dungeon Key — opens locked doors. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dungeon Key — opens locked doors; one per door or magical key opens all
